---
title: "Welcome"
---

Hello. Welcome to my personal website.

I was raised in Honduras and at the moment I am living in Germany. As of 05.2023 I am a doctoral researcher at the Cluster of Excellence, SimTech. Soon I will be joining TU Dortmund and I will be working with Dr. Paul Bürkner in computational statistics. In general, I am interested in Bayesian Inference, Prior specification, Probabilistic Programming and High Dimensional Statistics.

I will be presenting in Nordstat 2023 on the 19th of June, 2023.

```{r}

```
